creator: snabb@epipe.com
text:
In sysinstall(8) "Choose Distributions" screen it looks like you
can choose "Minimal" option by pressing selection key A. However
selection key A also means "All" and "Minimal" is not activated by
pressing A ("All" takes precedence). In fact selection key 7 currently
jumps to "Minimal" but the menu displays the dys-functional A key
instead.

A screenshot of this confusing screen is attached.

Fix: Screenshot of the "Choose Distributions" screen:

Patch which changes the menu to display "7" as a selection key for
"Minimal" instead of "A" which conflicts with "All":
How-To-Repeat: Go to sysinstall(8) "Choose Distributions" screen and press "A".
You will be always taken to "All" even though it looks like it could
take you to "Minimal" as well.
